_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in developing operations-based testing scenarios.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for transformation logic, integration tests for pipeline components, and data validation tests using appropriate testing frameworks.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-004 (RM, cosine: 0.553), AB-S-009 (AB, cosine: 0.544).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.1/10 (raw 0.707). Shared vocabulary: [skill, testing]. DCWF-only terms [based, developing, operations, scenarios] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, appropriate, automated, components, data, frameworks] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.899 (P=0.929, R=0.872). P exceeds R by 0.057 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Skill in developing operations-based testing scenarios." and "Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.647 < STS 0.707 (gap -0.060). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [based, developing, operations] and [applications, appropriate, automated] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [skill, testing]. DCWF-only: [based, developing, operations, scenarios]. WIDAI-only: [applications, appropriate, automated, components, data, frameworks].
